tagline: Seeking Truth  ◆  Standing Firm  ◆  Speaking Plain
subtitle: Commentary & Truth
bibleQuote: "Buy the truth and do not sell it." — Proverbs 23:23

sections.title: Home
sections.content:
Welcome to The Goyim Standard

We exist to help you recognize the dark forces working against Whites, Christians, and people of European descent. We reject the lies, notice the patterns, and speak plain truth without apology.

Christ is King. Truth does not bend.

posts.title: Truth Doesn't Need a Majority Vote — It Only Needs to Be Said
posts.author: Goyim
posts.excerpt: We live in an age where the loudest voices are not always the truest ones. This site exists for one reason only: to say what is plainly true, without apology, without softening, and without fear.

posts.title: The Word Does Not Bend to the Culture
posts.author: Goyim
posts.excerpt: Scripture has stood through every empire that tried to rewrite it. It will outlast this one too.

posts.title: Why Ordinary People Are Tuning Out the Mainstream
posts.author: Goyim
posts.excerpt: Trust in legacy media has collapsed. The question is what fills the void — and whether it's better.

posts.title: Courage Is Not Kindness — But It Is Love
posts.author: Goyim
posts.excerpt: Speaking hard truth to someone you care about is harder than staying silent. That's exactly why it matters.

posts.title: Standing on Ground That Does Not Move
posts.author: Goyim
posts.excerpt: When everything around you shifts, what you're anchored to matters more than anything else.

sections.title: About
sections.content: Goyim — Writing plainly about faith, truth, and the world as it is — not as we're told it is. No spin. No agenda. Just the standard.

sections.title: Verse of the Week
sections.content:
"The truth will set you free — but first it will make you uncomfortable."
John 8:32
